definition: Country or institutional jurisdiction
Income and expenditure reference year
notes: Retain survey and price reference years separately when different

definition: Y single young; D dual-income no children; C household with dependent children
notes: C must distinguish couple-parent and lone-parent households

definition: Number of adult household members
notes: Use survey-specific adult definition and record it

definition: Number of co-resident dependent children
Age of individual or household reference person
Single; married; de facto/cohabiting; lone parent; other
notes: Do not infer complete financial pooling from legal status

definition: Number of household members with labour income
Employed; unemployed; inactive; mixed household
notes: Record full-time and part-time where possible

definition: Similarity of earners' industry or employer exposure
Co-resident; renter; owner with mortgage; owner without mortgage
Labour plus business plus property income before public transfers
notes: Use equivalised values only for living-standard comparison

definition: Wages and self-employment labour income
notes: Report individual and pooled household amounts

definition: Government cash transfers and regular private transfers
Cash support from non-household family members
Co-residence housing services; childcare; food; transport or other in-kind help
Market income plus cash transfers minus direct taxes and social contributions
Cash disposable income plus social transfers in kind
Rent or mortgage interest plus taxes insurance maintenance and utilities
Principal repayment that increases housing equity
notes: Capital formation rather than pure consumption

definition: Recurring transport and commuting expenditure
notes: Include vehicle finance separately if possible

definition: Formal childcare and related recurring care expenditure
Education expenditure for adults and children
Premiums contributions and out-of-pocket healthcare costs
Required principal and interest payments on non-housing and housing debts
notes: Housing principal also recorded in A020

definition: Normal consumption excluding asset purchases and debt principal
notes: Definition must be harmonised by category

definition: Cash disposable income minus recurring consumption and required cash payments
Cash surplus plus compulsory pension accrual and housing principal less dissaving
notes: Separate current cash from locked saving

definition: Cash deposits and readily saleable financial assets
Liquid assets divided by essential monthly expenditure
Home value minus secured housing debt
Defined contribution balance or estimated pension rights
notes: Record access restrictions and valuation method

definition: Financial assets minus non-mortgage financial liabilities
All included assets minus liabilities
notes: Asset coverage must be identical before comparison

definition: Housing cash cost divided by cash disposable income
notes: Report thresholds but do not treat as universal welfare cut-offs

definition: Housing transport debt childcare insurance divided by reliable income
notes: Research construct; category list must be explicit

definition: Share of cash and in-kind resources from outside household
Individual income liquid assets pension and account access within household
notes: Do not infer from household totals

definition: Months essential spending can be maintained without new labour income
notes: Include liquid assets and reliable transfers; report assumptions

definition: Sampling design weights missingness and uncertainty
notes: Record standard errors or replicate-weight method
